style_prompt: STYLE: Bold cartoon RPG item icon (Cat Quest / Castle Crashers style). THICK black outlines (5-6px), bold and clean edges. Maximum 2-3 flat color fills per object, absolutely NO gradients. Minimal internal lines — silhouette-driven design. NO textures, NO fine patterns, NO realistic shading, NO hatching. Simple chunky forms, exaggerated proportions. FRAMING: The ENTIRE object must be fully visible and contained inside the canvas with generous safe margin on ALL sides. Item centered, fills at most 75% of canvas. Nothing may touch or extend beyond any edge. Transparent background PNG. PALETTE: Indigo #2D1B4E, teal #4A7C7E, amber #F5C542, gold #E8B84B, rose #E8B4C8, lavender #B89FD4, plum #1A0F2E. GENERATION SIZE BY RATIO: 1:1(1x1,2x2)→1024x1024, 2:1(2x1)→1024x512, 1:2(1x2)→512x1024, 3:1(3x1)→1536x512, 1:3(1x3)→512x1536, 4:1(4x1)→2048x512, 1:4(1x4)→512x2048, 3:2(3x2)→1152x768, 2:3(2x3)→768x1152, 5:1(5x1)→2560x512, 1:5(1x5)→512x2560. NEGATIVE: realistic, detailed texture, 3D, gradient, photo, thin lines, intricate, complex shading, neon, background, fine detail, hatching, crosshatch, cropped, clipped, cut off, partial object, extending beyond frame, bleeding edge
